calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Arlene Helfrich, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Pax Beale and Sophie Taggart dba Bush & Octavia Realty.
Plaintiff's Witness Pax Beale was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Center IMT; Center IMT San Francisco; Center IMT Physical Therapy, San Francisco and Thomas Giammatteo as follows:
Damages/Principal $90,071.87
Attorney's Fees $6906.00
Costs $969.50, for a total of $97,947.37
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Continued To Oct-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To May-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
